description: This file is part of the Bootstrap library, providing DOM manipulation utilities for data attributes, including normalization, setting, removing, and retrieving data attributes on HTML elements.

methods.name: normalizeData
methods.description: Normalizes a string value into boolean, null, number, or JSON object based on its content.

methods.name: normalizeDataKey
methods.description: Converts camelCase keys into kebab-case for data attribute naming.
